attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
'SERVICE_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
'Cisco' SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
WI.ERP_DEAL_ID                           ,
-1 BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
'Y' SERVICE_FLG                        ,
WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT   ,
WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.AR_TRX_KEY, 
CASE WHEN MSI.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN MSI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE MSI.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)
) AS  DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_FIN_DFR_CCW_SVC_TRN11 WI
INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS MSI   ON MSI.ITEM_KEY=WI.PRODUCT_KEY
 WHERE PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT <> WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_MTH_CNT   WHERE  RUN_BATCH_ID =1)

WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
'SERVICE_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
'Cisco' SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
WI.ERP_DEAL_ID                           ,
-1 BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
'Y' SERVICE_FLG                        ,
WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT   ,
WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.AR_TRX_KEY, 
CASE WHEN MSI.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN MSI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE MSI.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)
) AS  DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_FIN_DFR_CCW_SVC_TRN11 WI
INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS MSI   ON MSI.ITEM_KEY=WI.PRODUCT_KEY
 WHERE PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT <> WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_MTH_CNT   WHERE  RUN_BATCH_ID =4)

WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.AR_TRX_KEY, 
CASE WHEN MSI.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN MSI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE MSI.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' ||
TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)
) AS  DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_FIN_DR_CCW_NET_TRG22 WI
INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS MSI   ON MSI.ITEM_KEY=WI.PRODUCT_KEY
 WHERE PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT <> WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_MTH_CNT   WHERE  RUN_BATCH_ID =1)
